---
title: "Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs"
---

# Transformation, Algorithms, and Working Verbs

Range: `0372-0511`.

## Completion

| Status   | Count |
| -------- | ----- |
| authored | 140   |

Use the summary table for scanning. Each row links to the detailed anchored entry below.

| 0372  | [aggregate {Verb}](#rune-0372)   | authored   | `aggregate` in its Verb sense is a transformation and algorithms rune for make the operation, cost, and information movement explicit; use it when the artifact needs the aggregate obligation named before work proceeds.     |

| 0511  | [zip](#rune-0511)                | authored   | `zip` is a transformation and algorithms rune for make the operation, cost, and information movement explicit; use it when the artifact needs the zip obligation named before work proceeds.                                   |
